title: Peigne Rangé — Height Formula
description:
A 'peigne rangé' (right-combed tree) with n leaves has height exactly n-1. Verify this: given a peigne rangé encoded as a list of its leaf values (left-to-right, bottom-to-top), compute its height.

The tree looks like: Noeud(Noeud(Noeud(Feuille a, Feuille b), Feuille c), Feuille d)
for leaves [a,b,c,d] — height = 3.
inputSpec: First line: n (number of leaves). Second line: n integers (leaf values).
outputSpec: The height of the peigne rangé (= n - 1).

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in for _=1 to n do ignore(Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) done;Printf.printf"%d\n"(n-1)
